claim_boundary: Alignment proves only current row-level parity among declared obligations, owner code, and supplied evidence; it does not prove unmodeled behavior or production conformance.

closure_rules.scope: current target revision and declared route only

forbidden_shortcuts.summary: Do not create a SkillGuard-owned alternate execution route.
Do not convert configured booleans, generated JSON, or progress into native pass evidence.
Do not skip required stages, checks, receipts, or blockers.

integration_claim_boundary: SkillGuard gates the target-native FlowGuard route; it does not execute a parallel controller or replace native model/test evidence.

native_check_bindings.evidence_source: current model runner receipt and final report

native_check_inventory.summary: Run the model-code-test alignment model and known-bad bindings.

native_route_bindings.source: FlowGuard canonical route registry and target contract source

not_parallel_route_proof.evidence_source: Canonical route registry, contract source, and may_define_* false gates
not_parallel_route_proof.summary: SkillGuard only validates the FlowGuard-owned route and cannot define an alternate successful execution path.

phases.summary: Define claim scope, commitments, obligations, required test kinds, and external behavior boundaries.
Inventory owner CodeContracts, tests, source audits, transitions/fields/payloads, boundary observations, and evidence targets.
Consume canonical cases and build row-level model-code-test bindings with stable target ids and gaps.
Run the alignment model; send large/slow evidence to TestMesh through typed handoff while retaining semantic ownership.
Return binding summaries and block broad coverage on stale, missing, orphan, duplicate, internal-only, or overclaimed rows.

quality_floors.summary: Prompt prose, progress, or generated records cannot replace native evidence.
Missing, stale, skipped, scoped, progress-only, or pass-with-gaps evidence cannot support broad closure.

required_evidence.source: FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact

route_inventory.summary: Bind explicit model obligations to owner external code contracts and current same-behavior test, source, boundary, transition, payload, or replay evidence.

do_not_use_when: The task is test/code/model partitioning, conformance replay, or the obligations have not yet been defined.
routes.summary: Bind explicit model obligations to owner external code contracts and current same-behavior test, source, boundary, transition, payload, or replay evidence.

runtime_lock_policy.applies_when: The flowguard-model-test-alignment skill is selected or delegated.
runtime_lock_policy.summary: The target-local contract, route, stage order, checks, evidence, and coverage matrix gate closure.

source_requirements.summary: Concrete source/payload/counterexample claims require current target-aware audit, boundary, or external execution evidence.
Every required behavior binds one model obligation, owner external code contract, and current same-contract test evidence.
Large or slow evidence is handed to TestMesh with target ids; MTA retains semantic binding ownership and does not count delegated work as pass.
Accept explicit obligations, owner contracts, and evidence; compare bindings/freshness; block missing external-contract proof, stale audits, or orphan/duplicate rows; hand evidence hierarch.
description: Use when model obligations, owner external CodeContracts, source audits, transition cells, boundary observations, payload cases, closure targets, or ordinary test evidence need.
Route id: model_test_alignment; role: public_owner; native owner: model_test_alignment. This standalone FlowGuard satellite skill owns alignment rows; it sends large/slow evidence to TestMe.
Use for model-code-test coverage, transition/closure cells, field projections, real-code boundaries, counterexample targets, or file/generated/AI work-package payload evidence.
The target section 'Use When' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Edit .skillguard/contract-source.json, then regenerate derived contracts; SkillGuard checks native alignment parity and cannot run TestMesh or manufacture code/test proof.
Full confidence requires each required obligation to bind one owner external code contract and current same-contract test evidence.
The target section 'Hard Gates' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Missing/stale/skipped/source-audit/payload/target evidence or template harvest closure blocks broad alignment; large evidence may be delegated, never silently counted.
Return evidence, failures, blockers, skipped_checks, residual_risk, claim_boundary, and typed_next_actions, plus coverage bindings and open gap codes.
Verify the real FlowGuard check engine and AGENTS.md managed record; never create a fake mini-framework.
The target skill description must be represented in the contract: Use when model obligations, owner external CodeContracts, source audits, transition cells, boundary observations, payload c.
The target skill entrypoint and hard gates must be represented by the runtime contract.
Declared hard gates and required workflow steps must be represented by checks and closure blockers.
Do not split tests, code, or models, run mesh ownership, or replace conformance replay; return undefined obligations to model-first-function-flow.
The target section 'Do Not Use When' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
The target section 'Output Requirements' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Classify gaps and issue typed TestMesh, maturation, risk-ledger, or closure handoffs.
Compare declared model obligations, owner code external contracts, and current test evidence for the same behavior without owning test/code/model partitioning.
Consume canonical ContractExhaustionMesh ids, source/boundary observations, and current test evidence; build ModelCodeTestBindingRow closure summaries.
The target section 'FlowGuard Model-Test Alignment' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
List obligations, commitment ids, transitions/fields/payloads, owner CodeContract rows, and required evidence kinds.
name: flowguard-model-test-alignment
Read references/model_test_alignment_protocol.md for CodeContract, ArtifactPayloadContract, source audits, transition/leaf matrices, closure targets, and binding rows.
The target section 'Required Workflow' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
